question: The concept of 'concussion protocols in sport'
options: Acclimatisation, hydration, appropriate clothing and monitoring exertion
Breathing pure oxygen under pressure to accelerate tissue healing
Provides joint support and proprioceptive feedback to prevent re-injury
Standardised assessment (SCAT) and graduated return-to-play before resuming contact
answer: Standardised assessment (SCAT) and graduated return-to-play before resuming contact

question: 'Anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury prevention'
options: Pre-exercise warm-up, medication and avoiding triggers
Neuromuscular training programmes reduce ACL injury risk significantly
Identifies movement limitations and asymmetries that predispose athletes to injury
Ice baths and cold exposure reduce inflammation and perceived soreness
answer: Neuromuscular training programmes reduce ACL injury risk significantly

question: The concept of 'overuse injuries'
options: Gradual accumulation of stress without adequate recovery — e.g. shin splints, stress fractures
Standardised assessment (SCAT) and graduated return-to-play before resuming contact
Deep tissue massage, myofascial release and trigger point therapy
Provides joint support and proprioceptive feedback to prevent re-injury
answer: Gradual accumulation of stress without adequate recovery — e.g. shin splints, stress fractures

question: 'Tendinopathy management'
options: Progressive loading exercise is more effective than rest for chronic tendon pain
Reduces muscle tension, improves circulation and aids psychological recovery
Identifies movement limitations and asymmetries that predispose athletes to injury
Full pain-free movement, strength symmetry and sport-specific testing
answer: Progressive loading exercise is more effective than rest for chronic tendon pain
